channel.title: China on Tony Klausing
channel.description: Recent content in China on Tony Klausing

item.title: That New Car Smell: Observations from China and Taiwan
item.description: Like many Americans, I delayed visiting China for years. For starters there’s the distance. That’s at least a 12-hour backbreaker from California. Then there’s general unusualness of it. When I told a friend I was going to China, he blinked, and asked, “You mean China One? The restaurant?” “No,” I said. “China. The actual one.” He laughed. “And pray tell … why?” Well I had a speaking engagement in Taiwan, and I figured that if I was going across the ocean I might as well go see the Middle Kingdom with my own two eyes while they still worked.
